headlines: AI customers are coming around to the idea that small is beautiful
Irish datacenters now guzzle 23% of the country's electricity
Slothful summer app lets you scroll simply by tilting your head
Destructive Windows backdoor stuffs multiple wipers and ransomware code into a single package
crew_quote: "With Irish datacenters guzzling all that power, it's a wonder we aren't all sweating like a curry in a sauna! I mean, I've seen more energy efficiency from a three-legged hamster."
